Import torch and relevant modules from x_transformers including XTransformer and necessary utilities
Set a fixed random seed for reproducibility using torch.manual_seed(0)
Define batch size as 1 for simplicity and reproducibility
Set encoder sequence length (ENC_SEQ_LEN) to 258 tokens
Set decoder output sequence length (DEC_SEQ_LEN) to a smaller value, e.g., 230 tokens, to reproduce the bug where output length is less than input length
Define vocabulary size (NUM_TOKENS) as 1000 tokens for token embedding
Instantiate an XTransformer model with parameters: dim=64, enc_max_seq_len=ENC_SEQ_LEN, dec_max_seq_len=DEC_SEQ_LEN, num_tokens=NUM_TOKENS, with default other parameters
Create a random integer tensor 'src' of shape (batch_size, ENC_SEQ_LEN) with values in [0, NUM_TOKENS), representing encoder input tokens
Create a random integer tensor 'start_tokens' of shape (batch_size, 1) with values in [0, NUM_TOKENS), representing initial decoder input tokens
Create an attention mask 'src_mask' of shape (batch_size, ENC_SEQ_LEN) filled with True (no masking) to pass as mask to the encoder and decoder
Call model.generate(src, start_tokens, DEC_SEQ_LEN, mask=src_mask) to generate a decoded sequence shorter than the encoder input

Catch any RuntimeError exceptions during the call, specifically looking for 'The size of tensor a (258) must match the size of tensor b (230) at non-singleton dimension 3' indicating a dimension mismatch in attention masking
If no exception is raised, verify output tensor shape is (batch_size, DEC_SEQ_LEN) confirming generation length is shorter than input length
If exception is raised, capture and print the full traceback to verify it matches the reported error
Assert that the exception occurs given the shorter output sequence length compared to the input sequence length
Optionally, repeat the test changing DEC_SEQ_LEN to be equal or greater than ENC_SEQ_LEN to verify the bug does not occur in those cases
Ensure all operations are done on CPU or a CUDA device if available, specifying device during tensor creation
Use minimal imports and dependencies to isolate the bug in model.generate with cross attention and differing input/output sequence lengths
